name: X-Golf Eden Prairie
about: X-Golf Eden Prairie is an indoor golf facility featuring 7 state-of-the-art golf simulators. It offers a comprehensive experience combining golf play, training, and entertainment with a full bar and food service. The venue operates on a per-bay, hourly pricing model with various discounts available for off-peak times, seniors, veterans, and specific promotions. It is well-suited for casual play, group events, leagues, and corporate functions due to its flexible booking options and event hosting capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses premium camera, laser, and impact sensor technology for high accuracy
Accommodates up to 6 people per bay, making it great for groups
Offers a full bar and kitchen for food and drinks
Hosts leagues and tournaments for competitive play
Provides club rentals and fittings for convenience

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen available with a full food menu
Full bar with beer, wine, and spirits

simulator_hardware.notes: Combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available. You can also use your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not allowed; the venue has a full bar and kitchen.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes about 1 hour for one person to play 18 holes. For more players, add 1 hour per additional person.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome.
